name: BridgePass Company Criteria Dataset
source: Public company career pages and manual fallback summaries
generationMethod: Company Criteria Engine: crawl or seed input -> text cleaning -> hiring signal extraction -> rubric generation -> validation
geminiStatus: Gemini-compatible structured extraction is supported, but this dataset was generated with fallback extraction because Gemini API quota was unavailable during local generation.
intendedUse: Frontend and matching logic can load companyRubrics.json to display company-specific evaluation criteria.
safetyNote: This dataset provides guidance signals and evaluation rubrics for demo purposes. It must not be used as an automated hiring decision system.
limitations: Some companies may be based on fallback summaries rather than live extracted career pages.
Some public career pages are branding-oriented and do not contain detailed technical requirements.
The rubrics are for hackathon MVP demonstration and should be reviewed before real-world use.
